title: [FIRRTL][CheckCombLoops] Fix performance regression.
body:
Refactor the implementation to avoid redundant traversal of the IR. 
This records the output ports that are reachable from any Value, to enable
discovery of existing paths between ports of a module.
Runtime of the old `CheckCombCycles` pass for an internal design(p650mc) = 106  sec
Runtime of the new pass = 30 sec
